name: Grilled Pound Cake with Warm Fruit Glaze & Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Grill or broil slices of pound cake and set aside.
2. In a sauté pan, bring vinegar, brown sugar, strawberry preserves, and maple syrup to a brisk boil.
3. Reduce the mixture to a nice thick syrup, add fresh berries, and heat until warmed.
4. Serve strawberries over pound cake with ice cream on the side.
